basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Guwahati Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Guwahati (AIIMS Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Guwahati (AIIMS Guwahati) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 17 July 2026 on the official website aiimsguwahati.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Guwahati Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master in life Science/Relevant subjects from a recognized University OR Pharm D (Doctor of Pharmacy) from a recognized institution WITH 3 years of work experience from a recognized institution AND One research publications as first author/Corresponding author in SCI Journal
qualification.details: Master in Life Science/Relevant subjects from a recognized University OR Pharm D (Doctor of Pharmacy) from a recognized institution. 3 years of work experience from a recognized institution. One research publication as first author/Corresponding author in SCI Journal.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Guwahati to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. content_sections.heading: AIIMS Guwahati Research Assistant Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Master in Life Science/Relevant subjects from a recognized University OR Pharm D (Doctor of Pharmacy) from a recognized institution. 3 years of work experience from a recognized institution. One research publication as first author/Corresponding author in SCI Journal.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 27-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Guwahati to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Guwahati Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Guwahati Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Research Assistant post at AIIMS Guwahati is 27th July 2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Life Science or relevant subjects from a recognized university, or a Pharm D from a recognized institution. Additionally, 3 years of work experience and one research publication as the first author or corresponding author in an SCI journal are mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Assistant position is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the government's recruitment rules and guidelines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Assistant post will receive a consolidated monthly salary of Rs. 50,000.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Research Assistant position announced by AIIMS Guwahati in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the AIIMS Guwahati Research Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Research Assistant recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant role at AIIMS Guwahati?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Research Assistant position will involve a Written Test, followed by an Interview, and finally Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job offered for the Research Assistant post at AIIMS Guwahati is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Guwahati, Assam, with the pincode 781101.
